name: NextEra Energy Inc
summary:
NextEra Energy (NEE) reported earnings of $1.15 per share on revenue of $7.53 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.09 per share on revenue of $7.97 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.12 per share. The company beat expectations by 2.68% while revenue grew 12.45% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said in its earnings presentation it continues to expect 2026 earnings of $3.92 to $4.02 per share. The current consensus earnings estimate is $4.02 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

NextEra Energy Inc is an electric power company in North America, with approximately 42,500 MW of generating capacity in 26 states in the U.S. and 4 provinces in Canada.
subject: NextEra Energy Beat Expectations

name: American Express Co.
summary:
American Express (AXP) reported earnings of $4.53 per share on revenue of $19.64 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $4.41 per share on revenue of $19.62 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $4.50 per share. The company beat expectations by 0.67% while revenue grew 9.97% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said in its earnings presentation it continues to expect 2026 earnings of $17.30 to $17.90 per share but now expects revenue of approximately $88.51 billion. The company's previous guidance was revenue of $78.70 billion to $79.42 billion, and the current consensus earnings estimate is $17.67 per share on revenue of $79.28 billion for the year ending December 31, 2026.

Stephen J. Squeri, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, said, “Six months into the year, we’re seeing stronger momentum than we expected. The investments we made in our value propositions have driven accelerated spend and revenue growth; our Platinum portfolio is now the fastest growing in our U.S. Consumer business; our best-in-class credit performance further strengthened; and we continued to attract a large number of new customers, particularly Millennials and Gen-Zs who represent greater lifetime value. "

American Express Co is a payments, network and travel company, which offers credit payment card products and travel-related services to consumers and businesses.
subject: American Express Beat Expectations

name: Verizon Communications
summary:
Verizon Communications (VZ) reported earnings of $1.30 per share on revenue of $34.25 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.27 per share on revenue of $35.41 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.29 per share. The company beat expectations by 0.78% while revenue fell 0.73% compared to the same quarter a year ago.

The company said it expects 2026 earnings of $4.99 to $5.04 per share. The company's previous guidance was earnings of $4.95 to $4.99 per share, and the current consensus earnings estimate is $4.98 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

“We’re putting customers at the center of every decision we make,” said Dan Schulman, Verizon CEO. “With recent updates including our new Simplicity plans, Verizon One converged offerings, and an industry-leading loyalty program, we are gaining subscribers and earning long-term retention based on real value rather than subsidized promotions. Our second-quarter results provide clear, compelling evidence that this transformation is driving a structural inflection point across our entire business. We are accelerating across our key metrics, achieving a step-change in churn reduction while lowering our customer acquisition and retention costs. By compounding lower churn with healthier unit economics, we have generated the strongest operating position we have seen in years. Our core connectivity business is gaining momentum, and with the emergence of AI infrastructure revenue, we are fundamentally reshaping Verizon’s growth trajectory.”

Verizon Communications Inc is a provider of communications, information and entertainment products and services to consumers, businesses and governmental agencies. Its two segments are Wireless and Wireline.
subject: Verizon Communications Beat Expectations

name: Charter Communications Inc.
summary:
Charter Communications (CHTR) reported earnings of $10.66 per share on revenue of $13.53 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $9.96 per share on revenue of $13.52 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $9.87 per share. The company beat expectations by 8.00% while revenue fell 1.74% compared to the same quarter a year ago.

Charter Communications Inc is a cable operator providing services in the United States. It offers cable video programming, Internet services, and voice services, as well as video services such as video on demand, HD television and DVR service.
subject: Charter Communications Beat Expectations

name: SLB
summary:
SLB (SLB) reported earnings of $0.55 per share on revenue of $8.97 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.51 per share on revenue of $8.71 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.54 per share. The company beat expectations by 1.85% while revenue grew 4.98% on a year-over-year basis.

SLB is a global technology company that drives energy innovation for a balanced planet.
subject: SLB Beat Expectations

name: Booz Allen Hamilton Holding Corporation
summary:
Booz Allen Hamilton Holding (BAH) reported earnings of $1.81 per share on revenue of $2.80 billion for the fiscal first quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.49 per share on revenue of $2.80 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.57 per share. The company beat expectations by 15.29% while revenue fell 4.24% compared to the same quarter a year ago.

The company said it continues to expect fiscal 2027 earnings of $6.00 to $6.35 per share on revenue of $11.20 billion to $11.70 billion. The current consensus earnings estimate is $6.31 per share on revenue of $11.41 billion for the year ending March 31, 2027.

Booz Allen Hamilton Holding Corp provides management consulting, technology, and engineering services to the U.S. government in the defense, intelligence, and civil markets.
subject: Booz Allen Hamilton Holding Beat Expectations
